title: Tempting Turmeric Greek Penne Pasta Moussaka
description: A spicy and light Greek dish featuring penne pasta, shio-koji-cure, and Jain-friendly ingredients, served in a moussaka form on a salt block.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the penne pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the sliced eggplant until golden brown.
In a separate saucepan, combine the shio-koji, turmeric, and tomato sauce, and bring to a simmer over low heat.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked penne pasta, shio-koji-tomato sauce, and sauteed eggplant, and mix well.
In a separate saucepan, heat the vegetarian bechamel sauce over low heat until warm.

To assemble the moussaka, create a layer of the pasta mixture on the salt block, followed by a layer of the bechamel sauce, and repeat until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of bechamel sauce on top.
Bake the moussaka in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly.
Remove the moussaka from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
